message:
feat: Complete Metal → wgpu-native migration for cross-platform GPU

Replace macOS-only Metal backend with cross-platform wgpu-native:

- Add wgpu-native dependency (Zig 0.15 compatible fork)
- Implement GPU operations: vector_search, hash_table, batch_ops
- Share WGSL shaders between browser and CLI
- Cross-platform linking: Metal (macOS), Vulkan (Linux), DX12 (Windows)
- Delete ~2,500 lines of Metal-specific code

GPU module now uses same WGSL shaders as browser package for code sharing.
